prompt: Create a cute close-up anime chibi illustration of a pink-haired magical girl mascot on a clean white background, cropped in a wide banner format. The character has oversized glossy gradient eyes in pink and purple with golden highlights, a tiny smiling mouth, soft blush, and fluffy pastel pink twin-tails with curled ends filling both sides of the frame. Add straight bangs, layered side locks, and two small gold hair clips near the upper right side of her bangs. She wears a white fantasy idol-style outfit with gold trim, shoulder armor-like accents, a black choker detail, and small pink decorative elements. Her small hands hold a large stylized rounded triangular A-shaped emblem centered in front of her chest; the emblem is bright hot pink with a thick dark outline and a cutout triangular center. Use polished Japanese anime key visual style, clean line art, soft cel shading, glossy highlights, high detail in the eyes and hair, adorable proportions, symmetrical front-facing composition, and no text or watermark.
